name: Waking Nightmare
flavor: You don't show them anything real. You just remind their nerves what pain used to feel like, and let the memory do the rest.
description: You reach into a creature's mind within range and make it briefly, completely certain that it is being torn apart. The target must make an Intelligence saving throw against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}}, taking [[3d8]] psychic damage on a failure, or half as much damage on a success. A creature immune to being frightened has advantage on this saving throw, since the illusion has nothing to take hold of.
sheetSummary: Action, 60 ft, cooldown 2. Intelligence save vs trick save DC. Fail: [[3d8]] psychic damage. Success: half. Fear-immune creatures have advantage on the save.
